platform_overview.name: Srishringarr
platform_overview.type: E-commerce platform for jewellery and apparel (garments) rental and sales
platform_overview.description: Srishringarr is an online platform that allows customers to rent or buy jewellery and apparel/garments. The admin panel manages products, orders, rentals, categories, and inventory across multiple systems including a local database, a POS system, and a WooCommerce WordPress store.
platform_overview.business_model: Rental-first with sales option. Products can be rented with a deposit, or purchased outright. Commission-based pricing adjustments are applied over time.

con.name: Main Product Database (u464193275_srishrinjewels)
con.purpose: Stores all product information, categories, images, and product metadata

product.notes: SKU codes typically start with prefixes like YNI, YNL, ND, etc.

garment_product.notes: Similar structure to jewellery but with 'g' prefix on columns

jewel_subcat.description: Jewellery main categories (e.g., Necklace, Earring, Bangles)
jewel_subcat.notes: Filter by mcat_id=1 OR mcat_id=3 for active categories

garments.notes: Filter by Main_id=1 OR Main_id=3 for active categories

product_images_new.description: Product images for both jewellery and garments
product_images_new.notes: Use product_id for jewellery, gproduct_id for garments. Ordered by rank.

con3.name: POS Database (u464193275_srishringarr)
con3.purpose: Point of Sale system - stores inventory quantities, pricing, orders, and rental bookings
con3.access: READ-ONLY. Never write to this database.

phppos_items.description: POS inventory items with quantities and pricing
phppos_items.notes: The 'name' field contains the SKU code matching product_code/gproduct_code

phppos_rent.notes: booking_status tracks the lifecycle: Booked -> Confirmed -> Picked -> Returned

woo.name: WooCommerce Database (remote, u464193275_ib3Xh)
woo.purpose: WordPress WooCommerce store - the customer-facing website
woo.access: Remote database connection. Use sparingly due to network latency.

wpxyz_posts.notes: Filter by post_type='product' AND post_status='publish' for active products

dashboard.description: Overview page showing Total Orders, Monthly Revenue, Active Products count, Active Rentals count. Data fetched via API from the POS database.
dashboard.how_to_access: Click 'Dashboard' in the sidebar or visit the admin panel root URL

all_products.description: Lists all products (both jewellery and garments) in a paginated table with search and category filters. Shows product image, name, SKU, type, pricing, and booking status.

add_product.description: Form to add a new product. Select type (Jewellery/Garment), fill in name, SKU, category, subcategory, pricing, and upload images.

edit_product.description: Edit an existing product's details and images
edit_product.how_to_access: Click the edit button on any product in the product list

woo_products.description: View products from the WooCommerce (WordPress) remote store. Shows products synced to the customer-facing website with their SKU, price, stock, and categories.

import.description: Bulk add/update products via Excel file upload. Supports column mapping and row-by-row status tracking.
import.how_to_access: Click 'Add Products' under 'Bulk Operations' in the sidebar

bulk_delete.description: Bulk delete products from the local database by uploading a CSV of SKU codes. Only affects the local product database, NOT WordPress or POS.
bulk_delete.how_to_access: Click 'Delete Product' under 'Bulk Operations' in the sidebar

categories.description: Manage product categories. Handles both Jewellery categories (jewel_subcat + subcat1) and Garment categories (garments + garment_subcat). Add, edit categories and subcategories.

sku_audit.description: SKU Master Audit Report. Compares SKUs between the local database and the WooCommerce store to find discrepancies: products only in web, only in WordPress, or matching.
sku_audit.how_to_access: Click 'Reports' > 'SKU Master Audit' in the sidebar

pricing.description: Complex pricing model based on MRP, commission, and product type

jewellery.over_10k: Max(₹3000, Courier(₹1000) + CurrentSP × rate). Rate: SP≤40k→20%, SP≤60k→17%, SP>60k→15%

garments.over_10k: Max(₹3000, ₹2000(courier) + CurrentSP × rate). Rate same as jewellery.

sku_prefixes.YNB: Previously used, now removed from main site

common_questions.q: How many total products are there?
common_questions.hint: Query both 'product' (jewellery) and 'garment_product' (garments) tables and sum the counts using $con
Query phppos_rent where pick_date <= today AND delivery_date >= today from $con3
SUM(rent_amount) from phppos_rent WHERE current month/year from $con3

common_questions.q: How to add a new product?
common_questions.hint: Direct them to index.php?controller=product&action=add with step-by-step instructions

common_questions.q: Show products in a specific category
common_questions.hint: Join product with jewel_subcat or garment_product with garments
